hook: The right filter is not perfection; it is reduction of obvious mismatch.
body: You do not need to predict the whole relationship from a profile, but you can avoid many poor bets by screening for basic coherence.

hook: Some men wait for certainty before deciding, which keeps them stuck in unnecessary ambiguity.
body: Filtering is about probabilities and fit, not destiny and guarantees.

hook: Filtering is about probabilities and fit, not destiny and guarantees.
body: You may not know whether someone is right for you yet, but you can often tell whether the profile suggests enough openness to explore.
